Unexpected status 500 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~245,394 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 25 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~27,769 tokens (11% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.31–$3.68 per load ($1.53–$18.40 for a 5-page session)
231 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
All 77 images have alt attributes (77 descriptive, 0 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content

28 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
270 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)
